name: saic_ismart
desc: Dart client for the SAIC iSmart connected-vehicle API.

name: BasicVehicleStatus
desc: Core vehicle telemetry snapshot.

name: BasicVehicleStatus.fromJson
desc: Parses a BasicVehicleStatus from the basicVehicleStatus JSON object.

name: BasicVehicleStatus.new
desc: Creates a BasicVehicleStatus with the given raw field values.

name: batteryVoltage
desc: 12 V battery voltage (raw, unit undocumented).

name: batteryVoltageVolts
desc: Battery voltage in volts (× 0.1 V). Returns null when unavailable (-128 sentinel).

name: bonnetState
desc: Bonnet (front hood) state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: bonnetStatus
desc: Hood/bonnet state (0 = closed, assumed).

name: bootState
desc: Boot (rear trunk/tailgate) state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: bootStatus
desc: Trunk/boot state (0 = closed, assumed).

name: canBusActive
desc: CAN bus activity status.

name: clstrDspdFuelLvlSgmt
desc: Cluster-displayed fuel level segment.

name: currentJourneyDistance
desc: Distance of the current journey (raw, unit undocumented).

name: currentJourneyId
desc: Current journey identifier.

name: dippedBeamStatus
desc: Low-beam headlight state.

name: driverDoor
desc: Driver door state (0 = closed, assumed).

name: driverDoorStatus
desc: Driver door state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: driverWindow
desc: Driver window state.

name: driverWindowStatus
desc: Driver window state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: engineStatus
desc: Engine status. 1 = running — used in isEngineRunning.

name: extendedData1
desc: Undocumented extended field 1.

name: extendedData2
desc: Undocumented extended field 2.

name: exteriorTemperature
desc: Exterior temperature (raw, offset/scale undocumented).

name: exteriorTemperatureCelsius
desc: Exterior temperature in °C; null when not available (-128 sentinel).

name: frontLeftSeatHeatLevel
desc: Front-left seat heat level (0–3, assumed).

name: frontLeftTyrePressure
desc: Front-left tyre pressure (raw, unit undocumented).

name: frontLeftTyrePressureBar
desc: Front-left tyre pressure in bar (null when unavailable).

name: frontRightSeatHeatLevel
desc: Front-right seat heat level.

name: frontRightTyrePressure
desc: Front-right tyre pressure (raw).

name: frontRightTyrePressureBar
desc: Front-right tyre pressure in bar (null when unavailable).

name: fuelLevelPrc
desc: Fuel level percentage (0–100). Null for BEV.

name: fuelRange
desc: ICE range (raw, unit undocumented — likely metres or 0.1 km). Null for BEV.

name: fuelRangeElec
desc: Electric range (raw). Null for ICE.

name: fuelRangeKm
desc: Fuel range in kilometres (null when fuelRange is null).

name: handBrake
desc: Handbrake state. 1 = applied — used in isParked.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: interiorTemperature
desc: Interior temperature (raw, offset/scale undocumented).

name: interiorTemperatureCelsius
desc: Interior temperature in °C; null when not available (-128 sentinel).

name: isEngineRunning
desc: true when engineStatus == 1.

name: isParked
desc: true when the vehicle is parked — engine not running OR handbrake on.

name: lastKeySeen
desc: Last key-fob detection event (raw).

name: lockState
desc: Central lock state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: lockStatus
desc: Door lock state.

name: mainBeamStatus
desc: High-beam headlight state.

name: mileage
desc: Total odometer reading (raw, unit undocumented — likely metres or 0.1 km).

name: mileageKm
desc: Mileage in kilometres (null when mileage is null).

name: mileageMiles
desc: Mileage in miles (null when mileage is null).

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: passengerDoor
desc: Passenger door state.

name: passengerDoorStatus
desc: Front passenger door state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: passengerWindow
desc: Passenger window state.

name: passengerWindowStatus
desc: Front passenger window state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: powerMode
desc: Vehicle power mode.

name: rearLeftDoor
desc: Rear-left door state.

name: rearLeftDoorStatus
desc: Rear-left door state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: rearLeftTyrePressure
desc: Rear-left tyre pressure (raw).

name: rearLeftTyrePressureBar
desc: Rear-left tyre pressure in bar (null when unavailable).

name: rearLeftWindow
desc: Rear-left window state.

name: rearLeftWindowStatus
desc: Rear-left window state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: rearRightDoor
desc: Rear-right door state.

name: rearRightDoorStatus
desc: Rear-right door state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: rearRightTyrePressure
desc: Rear-right tyre pressure (raw).

name: rearRightTyrePressureBar
desc: Rear-right tyre pressure in bar (null when unavailable).

name: rearRightWindow
desc: Rear-right window state.

name: rearRightWindowStatus
desc: Rear-right window state, or null if absent or unrecognised.

name: remoteClimateStatus
desc: Remote climate control state.

name: rmtHtdRrWndSt
desc: Remote heated rear window state.

name: sideLightStatus
desc: Side/position lights state.

name: steeringHeatLevel
desc: Steering wheel heat level.

name: steeringWheelHeatFailureReason
desc: Steering wheel heat failure reason code.

name: sunroofStatus
desc: Sunroof state.

name: timeOfLastCANBUSActivity
desc: Unix timestamp of the last CAN bus message.

name: vehElecRngDsp
desc: Displayed electric range. Null for ICE.

name: vehicleAlarmStatus
desc: Vehicle alarm state.

name: wheelTyreMonitorStatus
desc: Tyre pressure monitoring system (TPMS) status.

name: BonnetStatus
desc: Typed state of the vehicle bonnet (front hood).

name: fromRaw
desc: Returns the BonnetStatus for raw, or null for null or unrecognised values.

name: raw
desc: Raw API integer value.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: BootStatus
desc: Typed state of the vehicle boot (rear trunk/tailgate).

name: fromRaw
desc: Returns the BootStatus for raw, or null for null or unrecognised values.

name: raw
desc: Raw API integer value.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: ClimateMode
desc: Fan speed mode for SaicClient.startClimate.

name: raw
desc: Raw integer value sent as the fanSpeed parameter.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: DoorStatus
desc: Typed state of a vehicle door.

name: fromRaw
desc: Returns the DoorStatus for raw, or null for null or unrecognised values.

name: raw
desc: Raw API integer value.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: ExtendedVehicleStatus
desc: Extended vehicle status containing alert data.

name: ExtendedVehicleStatus.fromJson
desc: Parses an ExtendedVehicleStatus from the extendedVehicleStatus JSON object.

name: ExtendedVehicleStatus.new
desc: Creates an ExtendedVehicleStatus with the given alert list.

name: alertDataSum
desc:
List of active vehicle alerts (0–64 entries). Each entry has an opaque
id and value (see VehicleAlertInfo); semantics are undocumented.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: GpsPosition
desc: Vehicle GPS location and fix quality.

name: GpsPosition.fromJson
desc: Parses a GpsPosition from the gpsPosition JSON object.

name: GpsPosition.new
desc: Creates a GpsPosition with the given GPS fix data.

name: gpsStatus
desc: Signal quality. Maps to GpsStatus enum.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: latitudeDegrees
desc:
Latitude in decimal degrees, derived from the raw integer field
(wayPoint.position.latitude / 1,000,000). null if unavailable.

name: longitudeDegrees
desc:
Longitude in decimal degrees, derived from the raw integer field
(wayPoint.position.longitude / 1,000,000). null if unavailable.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: timeStamp
desc: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the GPS fix.

name: wayPoint
desc: Waypoint data — position, heading, speed, satellites.

name: GpsStatus
desc: GPS signal quality levels returned in GpsPosition.gpsStatus.

name: fromValue
desc:
Returns the GpsStatus for value, falling back to noSignal for
any undocumented value.

name: value
desc: Raw integer value as returned by the API.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: HeatLevel
desc: Heat intensity level for heated seat and rear-window commands.

name: raw
desc: Raw byte value sent as the Base64-encoded paramValue.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: HeatedSeatCapability
desc: Heated seat capability level for a vehicle.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: LockStatus
desc: Typed lock state of the vehicle.

name: fromRaw
desc: Returns the LockStatus for raw, or null for null or unrecognised values.

name: raw
desc: Raw API integer value.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: LoginResponse
desc: Parsed response from a successful POST /oauth/token call.

name: LoginResponse.fromJson
desc: Parses the data map from a successful login JSON response.

name: LoginResponse.new
desc: Creates a LoginResponse from token and user fields returned by the API.

name: accessToken
desc: Bearer token sent as blade-auth header on all subsequent requests.

name: expiresIn
desc: Token lifetime in seconds from the moment of issue.

name: tokenExpiration
desc: Absolute expiration time — computed as now + expiresIn at parse time.

name: tokenType
desc: Token type — always "bearer" in practice.

name: userId
desc: Opaque user identifier returned by the server.

name: userName
desc: Username echoed back by the server.

name: Position
desc: WGS84 position in raw integer format.

name: Position.fromJson
desc: Parses a Position from the position sub-object in the GPS JSON.

name: Position.new
desc: Creates a Position with the given raw coordinate values.

name: altitude
desc: Raw altitude value (unit undocumented).

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: latitude
desc: Raw latitude integer — divide by 1,000,000 for decimal degrees.

name: longitude
desc: Raw longitude integer — divide by 1,000,000 for decimal degrees.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: RvcParam
desc: A single parameter in the rvcParams list.

name: paramId
desc: Parameter identifier — see RvcParamsId for known values.

name: paramValue
desc: Parameter value encoded as a Base64 string (typically a single byte).

name: RvcParamsId
desc: Parameter IDs used in rvcParams entries.

name: value
desc: Raw integer value sent in paramId.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: RvcReqType
desc: Remote vehicle command type codes sent in rvcReqType.

name: value
desc: Raw string value sent in rvcReqType.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: SaicApiException
desc: Thrown when the iSmart API returns a non-success response code.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SaicAuth
desc: Handles authentication against the iSmart OAuth endpoint.

name: isTokenExpired
desc: Returns true if tokenExpiration is at or before the current time.

name: login
desc: Authenticates config against the iSmart API and returns a LoginResponse.

name: SaicAuthException
desc: Thrown when authentication fails or a session has expired.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SaicCache
desc: Stores the last VehicleStatus per VIN and enforces a fetch cooldown.

name: SaicCache.new
desc: Creates a SaicCache.

name: clear
desc: Removes all cached entries.

name: clearFor
desc: Removes the cached entry for vin, if any.

name: get
desc:
Returns the cached VehicleStatus for vin if its age is less than
ttl, or null if the entry is absent or stale.

name: isCoolingDown
desc: Returns true if a fresh (within ttl) entry exists for vin.

name: set
desc: Stores status for vin, stamped with the current clock time.

name: ttl
desc: How long a cached entry is considered fresh. Defaults to 600 s.

name: SaicClient
desc: Entry point for interacting with the iSmart connected-vehicle API.

name: SaicClient.new
desc: Creates a SaicClient.

name: clearCache
desc: Clears all cached vehicle status entries, forcing fresh fetches.

name: clearCacheFor
desc:
Clears the cached status for vin only, forcing a fresh fetch for
that vehicle on the next call to getVehicleStatus.

name: controlHeatedSeats
desc: Controls the heated seats on vin.

name: controlRearWindowHeat
desc: Controls the rear window heating element.

name: controlSunroof
desc: Opens or closes the sunroof remotely.

name: findMyCar
desc: Triggers the "Find My Car" function on vin (horn + lights).

name: getVehicleStatus
desc:
Returns a real-time status snapshot for vin, serving from the cache
when the last fetch was less than the configured TTL ago.

name: getVehicles
desc: Returns all vehicles linked to the authenticated account.

name: isLoggedIn
desc: Returns true if the client has an active, non-expired session.

name: lockVehicle
desc: Locks all doors on vin.

name: login
desc: Authenticates and stores the session token.

name: logout
desc:
Clears the current session. The next API call will require a new
login.

name: openTailgate
desc: Opens the tailgate/boot on vin.

name: session
desc:
The LoginResponse from the most recent successful login call, or
null if login has not been called yet.

name: startBlowing
desc: Starts ventilation without A/C.

name: startClimate
desc: Starts remote climate control on vin.

name: startDefrost
desc: Starts defrost mode.

name: stopClimate
desc: Stops remote climate control on vin.

name: stopFindMyCar
desc: Stops the "Find My Car" function on vin (silences horn + lights).

name: tokenExpiration
desc:
The expiration time of the current access token, or null if not logged
in.

name: tokenExpiresIn
desc: The time remaining until the current session token expires.

name: unlockVehicle
desc: Unlocks all doors on vin.

name: SaicConfig
desc: Immutable configuration for a single iSmart user session.

name: SaicConfig.new
desc: Creates a SaicConfig.

name: password
desc: Plaintext password. SHA-1 hashed before being sent to the API.

name: phoneCountryCode
desc:
Phone country code (e.g. "44" for the UK). Required when
usernameIsEmail is false.

name: region
desc: API region. Defaults to SaicRegion.europe.

name: username
desc: iSmart account username — email address or phone number.

name: usernameIsEmail
desc:
When true, username is treated as an email and loginType: "2" is
sent. When false, loginType: "1" is sent and phoneCountryCode is
required. (base.py:login())

name: SaicException
desc: Base class for all exceptions thrown by the saic_ismart package.

name: code
desc:
API or HTTP status code associated with the error, or null if not
applicable (e.g. network errors, configuration errors).

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: message
desc: Human-readable message describing the error.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SaicNetworkException
desc:
Thrown when a network or HTTP transport error occurs (e.g. no connectivity,
DNS failure, or connection refused).

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SaicRegion
desc:
Supported API regions, each with its own base URI, tenant ID, and
REGION header value.

name: baseUri
desc: Base URI for all API calls. Trailing slash included.

name: regionHeader
desc: Value of the REGION header sent on every request.

name: tenantId
desc: Tenant identifier sent in the tenant-id header on every request.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: SaicSessionConflictException
desc: Thrown when a 401/403 is received while a session token is active.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SaicTimeoutException
desc:
Thrown when the event-id polling loop for SaicClient.getVehicleStatus exceeds its
timeout (default 30 s — TECHNICAL_REFERENCE.md §4).

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Vehicle
desc: A vehicle registered to an iSmart user account.

name: Vehicle.fromJson
desc: Parses a Vehicle from a JSON map returned by GET /vehicle/list.

name: brandName
desc: Brand name (e.g. "MG", "Maxus", "Roewe"), or null if absent.

name: getConfigItem
desc:
Returns the first VehicleModelConfigItem whose VehicleModelConfigItem.itemCode
matches itemCode, or null if no matching item exists.

name: modelName
desc: Human-readable model name (e.g. "MG ZS EV").

name: modelYear
desc:
Model year string as returned by the API (e.g. "2023"), or null if
absent from the response.

name: series
desc:
Model series code returned by the API (e.g. "ZP22 EU", "EH32"), or
null if absent.

name: vehicleModelConfiguration
desc: Hardware feature and configuration items returned by the API.

name: vehicleName
desc: User-facing vehicle nickname set in the iSmart app, or null if absent.

name: vin
desc: Unique vehicle identification number (VIN).

name: VehicleAlertInfo
desc:
Raw vehicle alert. id and value are 0–255 integers. Meaning of specific
id/value pairs is undocumented — no real-world non-empty sample available.
Max 64 alerts per response.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: id
desc: Opaque alert identifier (0–255). Meaning of specific values is undocumented.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: value
desc: Opaque alert value (0–255). Meaning of specific values is undocumented.

name: VehicleControlResponse
desc: Response from POST /vehicle/control.

name: basicVehicleStatus
desc: Vehicle status snapshot included in the control response, if present.

name: failureType
desc: Failure type code when the command was rejected; null on success.

name: gpsPosition
desc: GPS position snapshot included in the control response, if present.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: rvcReqSts
desc: Decoded request status bytes; null when absent or zero-length int.

name: VehicleFeatures
desc: Feature-detection wrapper around a Vehicle.

name: doorSensorCount
desc: Number of door sensors reported by the vehicle.

name: hasAirbags
desc: Whether the vehicle has airbags (regular airbags, item code Q00).

name: hasBatteryVoltageSensor
desc: Whether the vehicle reports 12V battery voltage.

name: hasBluetoothKey
desc: Whether the vehicle supports Bluetooth key.

name: hasBonnet
desc: Whether the vehicle has a bonnet sensor.

name: hasBoot
desc: Whether the vehicle has a boot/trunk sensor.

name: hasElectricVehicleFlag
desc: Official EV flag from the SAIC API (EV item code).

name: hasEnergyState
desc: Whether the vehicle reports energy state.

name: hasEngine
desc: Whether the vehicle has an engine status sensor.

name: hasExteriorTemperatureSensor
desc: Whether the vehicle has an exterior temperature sensor.

name: hasInteriorTemperatureSensor
desc: Whether the vehicle has an interior temperature sensor.

name: hasKeyPositionSensor
desc: Whether the vehicle reports key position.

name: hasRemoteClimate
desc: Whether the vehicle supports remote climate control.

name: hasRemoteControlledSunroof
desc: Whether the sunroof can be operated via remote control.

name: hasSunroof
desc: Whether the vehicle has a sunroof.

name: hasTyrePressureMonitoring
desc: Whether the vehicle has a tyre pressure monitoring system (TPMS).

name: heatedSeatCapability
desc: Heated seat capability for this vehicle.

name: isElectricVehicle
desc: Whether this vehicle is electric or electrified (BEV or PHEV).

name: isLeftHandDrive
desc: Whether the vehicle is left-hand drive.

name: isRightHandDrive
desc: Whether the vehicle is right-hand drive.

name: supportsTargetSoc
desc: Whether the vehicle supports setting a target battery SoC.

name: vehicle
desc: The vehicle whose configuration is being queried.

name: windowSensorCount
desc: Number of window sensors reported by the vehicle.

name: VehicleFeaturesExtension
desc: Convenience extension that adds VehicleFeatures access to Vehicle.

name: features
desc: Returns a VehicleFeatures wrapper for this vehicle.

name: VehicleLockId
desc: Lock target for RvcReqType.openLocks commands.

name: raw
desc: Raw byte value sent as the Base64-encoded paramValue.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: VehicleModelConfigItem
desc: A single entry in the vehicle model configuration array.

name: VehicleModelConfigItem.fromJson
desc: Parses a VehicleModelConfigItem from a JSON map.

name: VehicleModelConfigItem.new
desc: Creates a VehicleModelConfigItem.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: itemCode
desc: Machine-readable feature code (e.g. "S35", "HeatedSeat", "BType").

name: itemName
desc: Human-readable feature name as returned by the API.

name: itemValue
desc: Feature value, or null if absent in the response.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: VehicleStatus
desc: Top-level snapshot returned by GET /vehicle/status.

name: VehicleStatus.fromJson
desc:
Parses a VehicleStatus from the data object in a vehicle-status
API response.

name: basicVehicleStatus
desc: Core telemetry fields (doors, windows, locks, engine, battery…).

name: extendedVehicleStatus
desc: Alert data (structure undocumented).

name: gpsPosition
desc: GPS location and fix quality.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: statusTime
desc: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the last status update.

name: WayPoint
desc: A GPS waypoint containing position, heading, speed, and fix quality.

name: WayPoint.fromJson
desc: Parses a WayPoint from the wayPoint sub-object in the GPS JSON.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: hdop
desc: Horizontal dilution of precision.

name: heading
desc: Heading in degrees (0–359).

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: position
desc: Raw position in integer degrees × 1,000,000.

name: satellites
desc: Number of satellites used for this fix.

name: speed
desc: Speed (unit undocumented).

name: WindowStatus
desc: Typed state of a vehicle window.

name: fromRaw
desc: Returns the WindowStatus for raw, or null for null or unrecognised values.

name: raw
desc: Raw API integer value.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: batteryVoltageToVolts
desc: Converts raw battery voltage to volts (× 0.1 V).

name: fuelRangeToKm
desc: Converts raw fuel range (decameters — tens of metres) to kilometres.

name: mileageToKm
desc: Converts raw mileage (decameters — tens of metres) to kilometres.

name: mileageToMiles
desc: Converts raw mileage (decameters — tens of metres) to miles.

name: temperatureCelsius
desc: Returns null when raw is the -128 sentinel, otherwise returns raw.

name: tyrePressureToBar
desc: Converts raw tyre pressure (PSI × 2) to bar. Returns null for sentinels.

name: tyrePressureToKpa
desc: Converts raw tyre pressure (PSI × 2) to kPa. Returns null for sentinels.

name: tyrePressureToPsi
desc: Converts raw tyre pressure (PSI × 2) to PSI. Returns null for sentinels.
